sn38.1:1.0.1: On one occasion the Venerable Sāriputta was dwelling in Magadha at Nālakagāma. Then the wanderer Jambukhadakaapproached the Venerable Sāriputta and exchanged greetings with him. When they had concluded their greetings and cordial talk, he sat down to one side and said to the Venerable Sāriputta:
sn38.1:1.0.2: "Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘Nibbāna, Nibbāna.’ What now is Nibbāna?"
